title: Bricklayer
description: Bricklayer expands on the variety of bricks and brick-related items.
body:
Bricklayer is a discontinued mod for Fabric and Forge that expands on the variety of bricks.
 
Features:

    Dyed Bricks: Bricks can be dyed and made into other basic brick variants like slabs, stairs, and walls.
    Large Bricks: Large bricks can be used to craft Large Brick blocks; also have dyed variants.
    Carved Brick Blocks: Putting Terracotta into a stone-cutter will allow you to get Carved Brick blocks.
    Increased Brick Yield: Crafting a brick block will now yield 4 blocks instead of 1.
    Re-textured Bricks: Vanilla bricks have been re-textured to fit Bricklayer's style.
    Terracotta Blocks: Terracotta have been given their own stair, slab, and wall variants.

Previous Features:

    Painted Bricks: Adding dye to Brick Blocks will give you painted variants. (1.0.2)
